overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic elevated metro train through a cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera moves through the train car observing various passengers while neon-lit skyscrapers pass by outside the windows. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring distinctive green interior lighting and futuristic urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic metro train car illuminated by green neon lights. The camera stands near a seated woman with long dark hair wearing a plaid shirt, who is looking out the window at the passing cyberpunk cityscape. Other passengers are visible in the background as the train moves steadily through the urban environment.

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the train car to reveal the opposite seating area, where a man in a green-accented jacket looks at his phone while another man with bandaged arms rests with his eyes closed. The green neon lighting continues to illuminate the interior as the train moves through the city.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the center of the train car, focusing on a man in a blue sweater sitting calmly. Warm sunlight briefly illuminates the interior as the train passes between buildings. The man with bandaged arms remains visible to the right, and the futuristic cityscape continues to stream by outside the windows.

entered.detail: red and gold poster advertising the Night City Championship at Bukom Betty's Casino with a boxing glove emblem

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward a support pole to focus on a red tournament poster advertising the Night City Championship. After examining the poster, the camera pans back across the train interior, showing the man in the blue sweater now seated to the right. The train continues its journey through the neon-lit city as dusk settles outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit metro car that shifts from observing quiet passengers to focusing on urban advertisements as dusk settles over the city. It begins beside a woman in a plaid shirt gazing out at the cyberpunk cityscape, before panning left to reveal a man on his phone and another with bandaged arms resting in the green-hued interior. As the camera glides toward the center of the car, the cool neon lighting is briefly interrupted by a flash of warm sunlight streaming between buildings, illuminating a man in a blue sweater. The scene then shifts focus toward a support pole to examine a red tournament poster for the Night City Championship, before finally panning back across the interior to see the passengers once more as the train continues its journey through the darkening urban sprawl.
